name: Cherry Macadamia Nut Pancakes
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Sundried cherries (soaked in 1 cup water for 10 minutes and drained)
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift flour, salt, sugar, baking soda, and baking powder into a large bowl.
2. In a separate bowl, beat eggs, buttermilk, and melted butter until well combined.
3. Gradually mix the wet ingredients into the dry ingredients, stirring until just combined and slightly lumpy.
4. Heat a griddle or non-stick pan over medium heat. Lightly grease with oil.
5. Pour about 1/4 cup batter onto the heated griddle for each pancake.
6. Sprinkle half of the chopped macadamia nuts and soaked cherries on top of each pancake before cooking to the second side.
7. Serve pancakes topped with the remaining cherries, nuts, and a drizzle of whipped cream per serving.
From Chef Michael Valsich, Miramar Sheraton Hotel.
